dimensions.criterion: Exactly one topic resolved (topic in enum) and exactly one playbook read; no cluster load; two topics sequenced not merged.
Signature/origin verified before any external payload field is trusted (raw-body HMAC + constant-time + timestamp; reCAPTCHA siteverify with action+hostname; payment fulfillment webhook-driven).
Every money/event path is replay-safe, deduped on provider event id; replays cause no duplicate side effects.
Secrets/keys referenced from env/Firebase secrets, never inlined or client-side; missing required secret halts as VACIO_CRITICO.
The one failure that loses money or drops events for the topic is explicitly closed (quick) or all listed failure modes exercised (deep).
Every non-obvious claim tagged; no mixed tag families; provider-version facts flagged SUPUESTO; never green-by-default.

gate_threshold: no dimension at fail; verification-before-trust and idempotency must be pass
